idea-plugin.name: Faah
idea-plugin.description:
Faah — Exception Sound Alerter

Plays a custom sound alert whenever an exception, error, or fatal crash is detected in any console, terminal, run configuration, or Android Logcat output.

Features:
  • Sidebar panel to enable/disable monitoring and filter by error type
  • Monitors all console and terminal output for exceptions
  • Plays a sound alert on detection (with 2-second debounce to avoid spam)
  • Works with run configurations, tests, Gradle output, and Android Logcat
  • Toggle also accessible via Tools menu
Source: GitHub

Keywords: Faah, Faaah, Faaaah, Faaaaah, exception alert, sound alert, error sound, crash sound, crash notification, exception sound, console alert, logcat alert
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.1
  • Added plugin icon (light and dark variants)
1.1.0
  • Added sidebar panel (Faah tool window) for controlling monitoring
  • Per-type alert filters: Exception, Error, Fatal, Caused by, Stack frames
  • Sidebar checkbox stays in real-time sync with the Tools menu toggle via MessageBus
  • Removed toolbar button; toggle now lives in the sidebar and Tools menu
1.0.0 — Initial release.

action.description: Toggle exception sound alerts on or off
